sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24267" key="deuterourgh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δευτερ-ουργής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n24267.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">vamped up, second-hand,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χλαῖνα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:77" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.77</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
